# Engineering Session Review

## Summary
End-to-end integration of the Verona Platform. Combined Montague Tech mesh routing with Capulet Industries schema translation into a unified gateway.

## Key Achievements
- Full routing and translation pipeline working
- All 24 end-to-end tests passing
- Sub-millisecond latency on schema translation

## Engagement
High focus session with both Romeo and Juliet actively coding and testing.
